title: What happens when you try to chop a photon in half?
summary: A photon is a single particle of light, and under normal circumstances, it can’t be divided. When a single photon hits that mirror, it will either go through the mirror or reflect from the mirror.
caption: output/2026-07-22/what-happens-when-you-try-to-chop-a-photon-in-half.txt
